title: Death's Wish
description: A package with items to like.. yea.. help you demise!
body:
# Death's Wish A package with items to like.. yea.. help you demise!

Death's Wish requires Fabric Loader and Fabric API.

## Changelog The entire changelog can be viewed [here](https://gitlab.com/gaycookie/Deaths-Wish/-/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md) *Every release will also include the changelog for that release!* ## Contributors ### Translations - English by myself - Dutch by myself - German by [Apace100](https://github.com/apace100) - Polish by [MrRubberDucky](https://github.com/MrRubberDucky)
